DET_NPX_X.description: The number of sensor pixels in the X-axis. For ConeBeamGeometry this is the curved dimension.

DET_NPX_Z.description: The number of sensor pixels in the Z-axis. For ConeBeamGeometry this is the height dimension.

DET_PIX_SIZE.description: The size of a single sensor pixel. Only square pixels are allowed currently.

DET_X_MIN.description: The minimum point of the angle partition of the sensor. Measured in radians.

DET_X_MAX.description: The maximum point of the angle partition of the sensor. Measured in radians.

DET_Z_MIN.description: The minimum point of the sensor in the z-axis.

DET_Z_MAX.description: The maximum point of the sensor in the z-axis.

SRC_RADIUS.description: The radius of the source point.

DET_RADIUS.description: The radius of the sensor point.

REC_PIC_SIZE.description: The default size of reconstruction voxels. Used in the auto-resolution feature.

REC_NPX_X.description: The default number of voxels in the X-axis for reconstructions.

REC_NPX_Y.description: The default number of voxels in the Y-axis for reconstructions.

REC_NPX_Z.description: The default number of voxels in the Z-axis for reconstructions.

REC_MIN_X.description: The minimum point in the X-axis of the default reconstuction space. This is used as the default size for new regions of interest.

REC_MAX_X.description: The maximum point in the X-axis of the default reconstuction space. This is used as the default size for new regions of interest.

REC_MIN_Y.description: The minimum point in the Y-axis of the default reconstuction space. This is used as the default size for new regions of interest.

REC_MAX_Y.description: The maximum point in the Y-axis of the default reconstuction space. This is used as the default size for new regions of interest.

REC_MIN_Z.description: The minimum point in the Z-axis of the default reconstuction space. This is used as the default size for new regions of interest.

REC_MAX_Z.description: The maximum point in the Z-axis of the default reconstuction space. This is used as the default size for new regions of interest.

SINOGRAM_MIN.description: The minimum value in the sample's sinogram.npy file. Used to speed up sample switching.

SINOGRAM_MAX.description: The maximum value in the sample's sinogram.npy file. Used to speed up sample switching.
